Six Double Rooms and four Family Rooms, each with private en-suite bathroom, flat-screen TV, and fresh linen on arrival.

About Kopano

Kopano means togetherness

Kopano B&B sits on a quiet, tree-lined stand in Ferndale, Randburg — close enough to the N1 and William Nicol Drive to reach Sandton and Johannesburg CBD within minutes, yet private enough to feel like a break from the city. Ten rooms, one gate, one welcome.
